declarations.description: Buttons allow users to trigger an action or event with a single click.
declarations.name: Button

members.name: variant
members.description: The visual variant to apply to the button.

members.name: treatment
members.description: The treatment of the button — fill or outline.

members.name: size
members.description: The size of the button.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disable this control. It will not receive focus or events.

members.name: href
members.description: The URL to link to, rendered as an anchor element when provided.

members.name: label
members.description: An accessible label that describes the component. Applied to aria-label.

members.name: pending
members.description: Whether to display the button in a pending/loading state.

members.name: staticColor
members.description: The static color variant for use on dark or colored backgrounds.

events.name: click
events.description: Dispatched when the button is clicked.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: An icon to place at the start of the button, before the label.

cssProperties.name: --mod-button-border-radius
cssProperties.description: Override the border radius of the button.

cssProperties.name: --mod-button-min-width
cssProperties.description: Override the minimum width of the button.

declarations.description: Text fields allow users to input custom text entries with a keyboard.
declarations.name: Textfield

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disable this control.

members.name: invalid
members.description: Whether the textfield is in an invalid state.

members.name: label
members.description: A label for the field.

members.name: maxlength
members.description: Limits the number of characters that can be entered.

members.name: minlength
members.description: The minimum number of characters the user must enter.

members.name: multiline
members.description: Whether the textfield renders as a textarea.

members.name: pattern
members.description: A regular expression the value must match to be valid.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text for the field.

members.name: quiet
members.description: Uses the quiet variant of the Spectrum textfield.

members.name: readonly
members.description: Whether the textfield is read-only.

members.name: required
members.description: Whether the textfield is required.

members.name: type
members.description: The type of the underlying input element.

members.name: value
members.description: The value held by the form control.

events.name: change
events.description: An alteration to the value of the element has been committed by the user.

events.name: input
events.description: The value of the element has changed.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Default or non-negative help text to associate with your form element.

slots.name: negative-help-text
slots.description: Negative help text to associate with your form element when it is invalid.

cssParts.name: field
cssParts.description: The element that wraps the label and input.

declarations.description: Dialogs display important information that users need to acknowledge.
declarations.name: Dialog

members.name: dismissable
members.description: Whether to include a dismiss (close) button in the dialog.

members.name: error
members.description: Whether the dialog should be rendered in an error state.

members.name: headline
members.description: The heading of the dialog.

members.name: mode
members.description: The mode of the dialog — fullscreen or fullscreenTakeover.

members.name: noDivider
members.description: Whether the footer divider should be hidden.

members.name: underlay
members.description: Whether to render an underlay element behind the dialog.

events.name: close
events.description: Dispatched when the dialog is dismissed.

slots.name: heading
slots.description: A slot for the heading of the dialog.

slots.name: hero
slots.description: A decorative image at the top of the dialog.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Content for the footer area of the dialog.

slots.name: button
slots.description: Action buttons for the dialog footer.

declarations.description: The sp-theme component wraps a tree of Spectrum components with theme settings.
declarations.name: Theme

members.name: color
members.description: The color stop of the Spectrum theme.

members.name: scale
members.description: The platform scale of the Spectrum theme.

members.name: system
members.description: The design system to apply.

slots.description: The Spectrum components to which the theme is applied.
